title: Nilgiri Leaderboard Results
description: Per-model Nilgiri results, sliced by max output token budget. Each model is evaluated for `runs_per_model` independent episodes against the full 9-milestone / 32-flag attack chain; every metric is an `@N` statistic over those runs, computed separately for each token budget in `benchmark.token_budgets` (since the chain is strictly sequential -- clearing milestone k requires having already cleared 1..k-1 -- a run's progress at a given budget is fully described by how many leading milestones it completed). Metrics split into two kinds: 'global' (avg flags/milestones captured, independent of milestone selection) and 'milestone' (Pass@3, which is reported per milestone plus an 'overall'/full-chain figure).

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp this file was last (re)generated.

runs_per_model.description: Number of independent episodes each model is evaluated over (n=3 currently).

total_flags.description: Total flags across all milestones -- the sole source of truth for Avg CTFs@3's denominator.

total_milestones.description: Total milestones -- the sole source of truth for Avg Milestones@3's denominator.

milestones.description: Ordered milestone definitions (M1..M9). Each milestone's `flags` count is the sole source of truth for cumulative-flags math -- looked up by id, never duplicated inside a model's metric objects.

token_budgets.description: Max output token budgets this leaderboard is sliced by, ascending. The site's dropdown default is the last (largest) entry.

avg_flags_captured_at_3.description: Avg CTFs@3 -- mean flags captured across the 3 runs, out of benchmark.total_flags. A global metric: independent of milestone selection, varies only by token budget.

avg_milestones_completed_at_3.description: Avg Milestones@3 -- mean number of milestones fully completed across the 3 runs, out of benchmark.total_milestones. A global metric.

pass_at_3.description: Overall Pass@3 -- fraction of the 3 runs that captured every flag in the full 32-flag chain. This is the milestone-dependent metric's value when 'Overall' is selected.
Fraction of the 3 runs that captured every flag in this specific milestone. Since runs_per_model=3, this must be one of 0, 1/3, 2/3, 1.

status.description: Provenance: 'estimated' = derived from qualitative descriptions (e.g. the announcement blog), not raw eval logs. 'measured' = computed directly from real Inspect AI eval logs via generate_results.py --from-runs.

verified.description: Whether this result has been independently reproduced/audited, orthogonal to `status`. Shown as a checkmark badge in the leaderboard UI when true; no badge (not a cross) when false.

method.description: Short label for how the numbers were produced, e.g. 'ordinal-derived-from-blog-qualitative-findings' or 'inspect-eval-logs'.

source.description: URL or path to the source material.

caveat.description: Required whenever status is 'estimated' -- a human-readable caution against citing this as measured data.

by_token_budget.description: Keyed by token budget as a string (matching benchmark.token_budgets entries), one budgetSlice per budget.

notes.description: Freeform color that doesn't fit the grid's columns (e.g. token efficiency, robustness regressions, separate-experiment findings not reflected in these figures).
